# Milestone 5 version 1.0B - January 1st 2021

## M5V1.0B

### About

This is the second public release of the Jewels (Android Game) image folder for the SeanPM Life Archive project. This release contains data from September 10th 2020 to January 1st 2021.

This is an update to the  annual release for 2021.

This release includes:

> * Images from September 10th 2020 to January 1st 2021

> * A Project Wiki

> * Basic documentation

> * No other content included in this release

Changes in this release:

> * Deleted 105 `IGNORE.md` files

> * Added release notes for version 1

> * No other changes in this release

### Release data

Commits in last release: `526`

Commit change: `107`
